indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: rug
indicators.rationale: The rug obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: ceiling
indicators.rationale: The ceiling is too low for comfortable yoga practice.

indicators.name: lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is too bright and artificial, creating a harsh environment for yoga.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to the presence of a bed and rug that obstruct the open floor space required for practice. The low ceiling and harsh lighting also contribute to the negative assessment.
